headline: Seagate Board Transition Raises Questions For AI Storage Growth Story
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) announced the planned retirement of Lead Independent Director Mike Cannon from its Board of Directors. Cannon, a former Board Chair, is stepping down after a long period of board service that has influenced the company’s direction and governance. For investors watching Seagate at a share price of $817.35, this board change arrives after a period of very large multi year returns, with the stock up 184.3% year to date and about 7x over the past year...
